title: About Gamma Teb Asia
description: Gamma Teb Asia, As One Of The Leading Manufacturers Of Medical Equipment, Has Been Operating Since 2002. Starting In 2021, With An Innovative Approach And A Focus On Hygienic Products For The Food And Pharmaceutical Industries, The Company Specialized In Producing Oral Freshener Sprays. We Are Committed To Producing All Products With High Quality, Safety, And In Accordance With National And International Standards.
features: Production Of High-Quality strile And Non-strile Medical Equipment
Specialized Production Of Oral Freshener Sprays With Safe Formulation
Strict Quality Control In Accordance With International Standards
Bulk Order Availability For Medical Centers And Long-Term Cooperation
contactAddress: Alborz - Simin Dasht Industrial Town, 6Th East Street, No.111
